mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly boosting equity valuations over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines (Rank IC < 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 5.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative or flat when UNRATE crosses below 5.0% in more than 60% of observed instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts combined with rising industrial production indicate synchronized real-economy expansion, which lifts corporate revenue expectations and pushes equity prices higher over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising HOUST and INDPRO fails to predict positive 20-day returns in more than 50% of out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-interest-rate environment, rapid growth in real GDP signals resilient demand that offsets tightening costs, leading to positive equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: When FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.0%, positive GDPC1 growth does not yield statistically significant positive 5-day returns (t-stat < 1.96).

mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding business investment and consumer confidence, generating positive equity returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rolling 20-day forward returns show no positive relationship with PAYEMS growth rates over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production exceeds 110, supply chain bottlenecks ease and capacity utilization peaks, typically preceding profit margin compression and negative equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive or statistically indistinguishable from zero when INDPRO surpasses 110 in more than 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer credit balances coupled with stable industrial production indicate healthy demand without supply bottlenecks, supporting equity valuations over a one-week horizon.
failure_condition: The combination of rising RSAFS and stable INDPRO fails to produce positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rising unemployment, a simultaneous cut in the federal funds rate signals aggressive policy support that stabilizes equity markets and generates positive returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns do not turn positive when UNRATE increases and FEDFUNDS declines simultaneously, or the effect vanishes in a 3-year rolling window.
